div.div:
TargetReconciler
filter: spec.targetNode == this node
in-memory: targets map[NamespacedName] *targetEntry
• mxl.Writer (long-lived; kept across recoveries)
• fabrics.Regions + Target + Info (rebuildable)
• progress goroutine - ReadGrainNonBlocking →
Writer.OpenGrain(idx).Commit
Watches: MxlFlowMirror

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 400px; height: 1px; padding-top: 267px; margin-left: 632px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0px; text-align: left;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(31, 41, 51); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: none; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;

div.div:
SourceReconciler
filter: spec.sourceNode == this node
in-memory: sources map[NamespacedName] *sourceEntry
• mxl.Reader
• fabrics.Regions + Initiator + Info
• transfer goroutine - poll Reader.Runtime();
TransferGrain on each new HeadIndex
• infoStr cache → detects peer TargetInfo rotation
Watches: MxlFlowMirror,
MxlFlow
(closes the writer-
startup race - wakes when agent publishes Origin)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 400px; height: 1px; padding-top: 267px; margin-left: 1132px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0px; text-align: left;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: rgb(31, 41, 51); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: none; white-space: normal; overflow-wrap: normal;

div.div:
capabilities.Publisher
(manager.RunnableFunc)
EnsureExists(MxlNodeCapabilities for this node)
RunRefreshLoop(ticker)
• refreshes status.providers (list of fabrics.Provider names)
• stamps status.lastSeen

div.div:
MxlFlowMirror.status
(written by TargetReconciler)
• phase: Pending → Materializing → Ready
• targetInfo: libfabric addr + memory keys
• observedGeneration

div.div:
Per-side finalizers
gateway.mxl.qvest-digital.com/target-side
gateway.mxl.qvest-digital.com/source-side
Ensures libmxl + libfabric handles get torn down
before the CR disappears from the API.
